notes: Per-widget config menus with scrolling for Seerr, Sonarr/Radarr and Tautulli (slider controls + view switches), a redesigned Light/Dark/Custom theme picker with an AI “Surprise me” option, a multi-select “add to dashboard” chooser, a rewritten How to Use guide, smoother drag edge-scrolling, steadier list-widget sizing, smaller icons with larger glyphs, and assorted UI polish.
